protocols.author: cogignition
protocols.title: Zone 2 Base with Fortnight HRV Gate
protocols.description:
14-day rolling HRV baseline gates above-Zone-2 work. Zone 4 / Zone 5 sessions are unlocked only when the day's HRV is within 85% of the fortnight mean and last night's sleep is at least 6 hours. Two-a-days are permitted when the morning brief returns full_protocol; the evening session is capped at Zone 3 regardless.
Built on Galpin / Norton periodization principles plus the carb periodization framework (Impey et al. 2018, "Fuel for the Work Required").

protocols.author: hooblarkhan
protocols.title: Compound Fortnight
protocols.description: Body recomposition, strength maintenance, and mitochondrial enhancement. HRV-gated daily decision picks one of three day shapes: pyramidal compound (KB → buffer → HR-rule HIIT) on high-readiness days, polarized compound (Z2 base + interval blowout) on moderate days, recovery (Z2 cardio + walking) on low days. Daily walking maintains a 7d-average 8k-step floor. Carbs are periodized to session demand; protein is constant.
